offer: For hotel managers processing 10–20 bookings/month, manual data entry causes delayed revenue insights. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet calculations.
problem: Inability to quickly generate accurate revenue and occupancy reports from sales data.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for hotel managers

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Collect 10 short interviews from target users
